title: Canadian Rocky Mountain Resorts ransomware incident

extortion.description: [AI generated] Canadian Rocky Mountain Resorts is a hotel and hospitality company operating in the heart of the Canadian Rockies. The company offers distinctive accommodations in iconic destinations, including Banff, Lake Louise, and Moraine Lake. It's popular for its scenic beauty, luxurious stay, dining, outdoor activities like hiking, fishing, and wildlife viewing. The company is committed to providing high-quality services ensuring a memorable guest experience.
